name: Minimize RWKV-7 FineWeb SP1892 val BPB under 5-min / 16-MB INT6

description: Baseline L8-D512 no RoPE no attention. Reproduces ~1.519 BPB from prior run. INT6=20.53MB (exceeds 16MB cap - needs downsizing for actual challenge).

asi.challenge_note: trained INT6=20.53MB exceeds 16MB cap - must downsize model or compress better
asi.hypothesis: reproduce baseline BPB before searching smaller configs

description: L10-D384 smaller model. Fits 16MB cap at 14.8MB INT6. BPB=1.545, worse than L8-D512 baseline as expected due to fewer params. Tradeoff: size-safe but lower capacity.

asi.challenge_note: Fits 16MB cap (trained INT6=14.8MB). BPB worse than baseline as expected.
asi.hypothesis: deeper narrower model fits size cap but loses capacity

description: L8-D448 baseline. Val BPB=1.538, trained INT6=16.0MB (right at 16MB cap). Slightly worse BPB than L8-D512 due to fewer params, but fits size limit.

asi.challenge_note: Right at 16MB cap. Best size-safe baseline so far.
asi.hypothesis: smaller baseline that fits size cap

description: L8-D448 + hybrid attention at layer 4. Val BPB=1.5087 BEATS the larger L8-D512 baseline! Trained INT6=15.8MB (under 16MB cap). Best result by far.
L8-D448 + hybrid attention every 3rd layer (layers 3,6). Val BPB=1.4983 beats every-4 config. Two attention anchors helps. INT6=15.6MB under cap. More attention seems beneficial.
L8-D448 + hybrid attention every 2nd layer (layers 2,4,6). Val BPB=1.4966, slight improvement over every-3. Three attention anchors. INT6=15.4MB. More attention continues to help slightly.
